POST.description: Triggers the generation and caching of a report by aggregating activity data.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th:
async def generate_report() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    global report_cache
    activities = await fetch_activities()
    report = []
    for activity in activities:
        activity_id = activity["id"]
        details = await fetch_activity_details(activity_id)
        report.append(details)
    report_cache = report
    return report
suggested_workflow.description: Fetches activities, retrieves details for each activity, and aggregates them into a single report.

GET.description: Retrieves the cached report in JSON format.
Fetches a list of activities from the external API.
Fetches detailed information for a specific activity by its ID.
